loops.finding: Overclaim demo should fail because submit language is enabled without a full clean validation packet.
loops.implementation: Fixture intentionally leaves submit prerequisites absent.

bluesky.route_or_idea: Let a process packet use submit language after a promising audit.
bluesky.best_case: The team notices promising work quickly.
bluesky.smallest_useful_experiment: Try the gate on this overclaim fixture.
bluesky.bounded_alternative: Keep the packet as Partial and route it to validation.
bluesky.hidden_assumption: Partial evidence can stand in for official clean validation.
bluesky.stop_condition: Stop if no Local full run 0/0/0 exists.

redsky.route_or_claim: Partial process evidence can use submit language.
redsky.current_public_truth_checked: frontier d44cad3/q1152/1571592960; no official clean validation in fixture
redsky.strongest_objection: Submit language requires a clean local full run and fresh frontier recheck.
redsky.missing_gate: Local full run 0/0/0 plus score below frontier
redsky.required_verification: fixture fails with submit language errors
